ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the stock price was recorded */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on that date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient if there was a stock split */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date", "time"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stock_tickers ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticker */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article being analyzed */,
  "neg_title" REAL /* Negative sentiment of the title */,
  "neu_title" REAL /* Neutral sentiment of the title */,
  "pos_title" REAL /* Positive sentiment of the title */,
  "compound_title" REAL /* Compound sentiment of the title */,
  "neg_body" REAL /* Negative sentiment of the body */,
  "neu_body" REAL /* Neutral sentiment of the body */,
  "pos_body" REAL /* Positive sentiment of the body */,
  "compound_body" REAL /* Compound sentiment of the body */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES financial_news ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the technical indicator */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the technical indicator was calculated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., SMA, EMA, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the technical indicator is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the market trend was observed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of market trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market trend */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dashboard was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dashboard is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget is added to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Settings for the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the widget was last updated */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the widget is visible on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)
